description: Using the project /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/countries_base.gvsproj, add the Populated Places layer from /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp. Set the layer's scale-dependent visibility so it is only visible at scales of 1:20,000,000 or larger. Save the project to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/scale_visibility.gvsproj.
